title: 7 Best Omnisend Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Compare the top Omnisend alternatives. Find the best email & SMS platform for your business with our detailed comparison.
intro: While Omnisend excels as an ecommerce email and SMS platform, other tools may better suit your specific needs, budget, or business model. Whether you're looking for more affordable pricing, advanced automation, or specialized features for creators or newsletters, there are several strong alternatives worth considering.
why_switch: Find a solution with more advanced CRM or automation capabilities at a lower price point
Access specialized features tailored to your industry, such as newsletter monetization or webinar hosting
Get better customer support ratings or user experience for your specific use case

alternatives.name: Klaviyo
alternatives.tagline: The platform for intelligent marketing automation
alternatives.best_for: E-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce
alternatives.key_difference: Klaviyo offers deeper ecommerce integrations with predictive analytics and review management specifically designed for online stores. Like Omnisend, it includes SMS and segmentation, but excels with its native Shopify/WooCommerce optimization and customer intelligence features.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: Businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign combines email, SMS, and CRM in one platform with advanced automation capabilities that rival Omnisend's omnichannel approach. It includes lead scoring and site tracking, making it ideal for businesses that need sophisticated customer journey mapping beyond basic email marketing.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo provides SMS alongside email like Omnisend, but adds WhatsApp and live chat for true omnichannel marketing at a competitive price. Its massive free tier (up to 100,000 contacts) and transactional email API make it particularly valuable for businesses with varying communication needs.

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: Small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite offers the lowest entry price ($9/month) with excellent automation and ecommerce integrations without sacrificing functionality. While it doesn't include SMS like Omnisend, it provides landing pages, pop-ups, and surveys, making it a more comprehensive solution for budget-conscious ecommerce businesses.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv specializes in newsletter monetization and includes built-in ad networks and referral programs that Omnisend lacks. It's the ideal choice if you're building a subscription newsletter business and want native tools for generating revenue directly from your email list.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit focuses on creators and includes native course delivery, commerce features, and visual automations tailored to that audience. Unlike Omnisend's ecommerce focus, ConvertKit is purpose-built for content creators who also sell digital products or courses.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.best_for: Online course creators and webinar hosts
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse stands out with integrated webinar hosting and online course functionality alongside email marketing and automation. If you need more than just email and SMS—such as hosting live events or selling courses—GetResponse provides these tools in a single platform.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Omnisend?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with up to 100,000 contacts and unlimited emails, including SMS capabilities similar to Omnisend. If you prefer email-only, MailerLite and ConvertKit both offer robust free plans with up to 1,000 subscribers, making them excellent zero-cost starting points.

faq.q: What is the best Omnisend alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is the top choice for small businesses due to its lowest pricing ($9/month), ease of use, and comprehensive features including automation and ecommerce integrations. For slightly more budget, Brevo also offers exceptional value with multi-channel capabilities (SMS, WhatsApp, live chat) at affordable rates.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Omnisend?
faq.a: Yes, MailerLite starts at $9/month compared to Omnisend's $16/month, and offers more features at the lower price point. Brevo ($25/month) and GetResponse ($19/month) also provide competitive pricing with additional channels like SMS, WhatsApp, or webinars included.
